Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be performed after SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time for SW-EIC Reject across all process variants ending with this activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-EIC Reject and the end of the case

Name: Time elapsed from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-EIC Reject in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject compared to the average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-EIC Reject in cases where the variant includes at least one Reviewer Invitation Reminder
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Reject' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-EIC Reject in variants that do not include any revision cycles
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be executed after the last occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject in comparison with the time from RW-Reviewer Agreed to RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-EIC Reject following SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that originated from an initial major revision cycle
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and SW-EIC Reject in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed appears exactly once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time for SW-EIC Reject when preceded by SW-Reviewer No Response versus when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time elapsed from the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-EIC Reject in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-EIC Reject in variants that end directly with SW-EIC Reject without any revision activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'
